llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced: (1) Items 14.3, 14.4, and 14.5 (staff recognition items) moved from end of agenda to immediately after oral communication and before bond program action items; (2) Items 12.4 and 12.5 moved to consent agenda; (3) Bond program items moved to be taken first for efficiency.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the consent Items?
